hero.title: From Floor to Profit:
hero.lead: Built by experts who have managed millions in manufacturing assets. InternoCore is not just a software; it is the experience of years resolving operational chaos in high-production plants.

architect.name: Carlos Flores Montoya
architect.bio: Industrial process specialist with a track record at **SMK** and **Zodiac Aerospace**. My focus is on eliminating the lack of control that drains money from companies.
architect.milestone_success_desc: We managed to reduce material loss from $4.8 million to just $40k in two months through strict control of every part and quality process.
architect.milestone_philosophy_desc: We create fast and reliable tools that don't stop, ensuring that plant personnel don't waste time in the system.

features.title: Power for Your Business
features.subtitle: Modules designed to make your company work like clockwork.
features.mes_desc: Monitor your plant in real-time, manage work orders, and eliminate bottlenecks immediately.
features.wms_desc: Warehouses organized with precision, maximum capacity control, and automatic error-free fulfillment.
features.cmms_desc: Preventive maintenance of machinery and tools so that your production never stops.
features.hcm_desc: Full control of who operates each machine through badges and secure access codes.
features.auth_desc: You decide who sees and who modifies information, protecting your business's most valuable data.
features.master_desc: All your **Products** information centralized in one place, avoiding naming errors or duplicate parts.
features.sub_desc: Monthly payments that grow with your business, with the assurance that your investment is protected.
features.notif_desc: Receive notices on WhatsApp or screens if something stops in the plant, allowing immediate action.

security.title: Iron Wall: Nothing is Lost
security.desc: Every movement is recorded forever. We avoid human errors by preventing a process from advancing if the previous step was not correctly completed.
security.list_auth: Secure Access with Badge or Code

pricing.title: Choose the Boost for Your Plant
pricing.subtitle: Solutions designed to give you profitability from day one.
pricing.plan_op_desc: Essentials for small companies that want to start growing with order.
plan_op_list: Inventory Control: Entries and exits under control.
plan_ind_list: Unlimited Users: Grow without extra costs per person.
plan_ent_list: Priority Support: Direct consulting at your plant.
Connection with other Systems: SAP, Oracle and more.

footer.copy: © 2026 InternoCore Project. Designed by Carlos Flores Montoya.

plans_page.title: Plans Architecture
plans_page.desc: From SME optimization to the technological sovereignty of large holdings. All prices in USD.
